zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan於1539年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克登波 卡素時，他的父親Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor60歲，母親Lady Julia MacCarthy30歲。他於大約1570年與Helena Esther Barry在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1594年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan于1539年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克登波 卡素时，他的父亲Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor60岁，母亲Lady Julia MacCarthy30岁。他于大约1570年与Helena Esther Barry在爱尔兰庫迪 科克结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1594年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

variants.name: Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

nameMeanings.name: Owen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern form of the Welsh name Owain or a transferred use of the surname derived from the personal name. It is also used as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Eóghan (see Scottish and Irish appendices), which is probably ultimately a cognate of the Welsh name. Although retaining its Welsh flavour, this is one of a number of Celtic names which have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

nameMeanings.name: Reagh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Ute.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Riabhach, which MacLysaght describes as an adjectival surname (meaning ‘gray’ or ‘brindled’) that ‘took the place of an hereditary one’.
Possibly an altered form of German   Rech  .

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan was born in 1539, in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Ireland, his father, Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor, was 60 and his mother, Lady Julia MacCarthy, was 30. He married Helena Esther Barry about 1570, in County Cork, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1594, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan est né en 1539, à Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlande, son père, Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Lady Julia MacCarthy, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Helena Esther Barry environ 1570, à County Cork, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan 1539 in Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor 60 und seine Mutter Lady Julia MacCarthy 30. Er hat um 1570 in County Cork, Irland Helena Esther Barry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1594 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan è nato il nel 1539 nel Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Lady Julia MacCarthy, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Helena Esther Barry circa 1570, nel County Cork, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivanが1539年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクダンボイ カストルで生まれた時，父Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Morは60歳，母Lady Julia MacCarthyは30歳であった。約1570年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクでHelena Esther Barryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1594年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan(이)가 1539년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 던보이 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Julia MacCarthy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1570년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 Helena Esther Barry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1594년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan nasceu em 1539, em Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Lady Julia MacCarthy, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Helena Esther Barry aproximadamente 1570, em County Cork, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan родился в 1539 г. в местности дунбои кастл, коунти корк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Julia MacCarthy, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Helena Esther Barry около 1570 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1594 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Owen Reagh O'Sullivan nació en 1539, en Dunboy Castle, County Cork, Irlanda, su papá, Lord Beare Dermod O'Sullivan Mor, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Lady Julia MacCarthy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Helena Esther Barry aproximadamente 1570, en County Cork, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1594, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
